payload.text: Running draft intake to classify scope and find blocking questions.
Draft intake classified this as task with 1 blocking question.

questions.question:
Should this new README ticket be drafted as a distinct follow-up to the existing Todo README tickets, or should it replace/merge one of them?

Why it matters: There are already several open README improvement tickets with overlapping scope. Without this decision, the implementation ticket could duplicate active work or create conflicting README instructions.
Recommended answer: Draft it as a distinct follow-up only if it targets a gap not covered by the existing Todo README tickets; otherwise merge it into the most relevant existing README Todo ticket instead of creating another duplicate.
